title: Wire barrel exports and add package dependencies to turbo_widgets
description: Add all newly created files to the turbo_widgets barrel file (lib/turbo_widgets.dart) and add any missing package dependencies to pubspec.yaml. This is the integration task that makes all moved widgets publicly accessible.
context:
turbo_widgets already exports ~50 files from its barrel (lib/turbo_widgets.dart). All the new files from tasks 1-8 need export lines added.

turbo_widgets pubspec.yaml already depends on: flutter, get_it, turbo_mvvm, turbo_notifiers, turbolytics, shadcn_ui, turbo_forms.

New package dependencies needed by moved files:
- mesh_gradient (used by color_extension.dart's MeshGradientPoint extensions)
- auto_size_text (used by text_style_extension.dart's AutoSizeText extensions)
- emoji_picker_flutter (used by t_emoji_picker_popover.dart)

NOTE: EntityContentSection was excluded from the migration — do NOT add flutter_markdown_plus, flutter_monaco, or new_loading_indicator.

IMPORTANT: Check versions in pew_pew_plaza's pubspec.yaml for the correct version constraints to use.

Also run `dart analyze --fatal-infos` on turbo_widgets to catch any issues.
instructions: Update this task status to 'in-progress' immediately.
Read the current turbo_widgets barrel file `lib/turbo_widgets.dart`.
Read pew_pew_plaza `pubspec.yaml` for package version constraints.
Scan ALL files created by tasks 1-8 using `find lib/src/ -name '*.dart' | sort`. Cross-reference against the existing barrel exports to identify what's new.
Add export lines for ALL new files to the barrel, maintaining the existing alphabetical/categorical ordering pattern.
Add missing package dependencies to pubspec.yaml with the same version constraints used by pew_pew_plaza.
Run `dart pub get` in the turbo_widgets directory to resolve dependencies.
Run `dart analyze --fatal-infos` in the turbo_widgets directory.

Fix any analysis errors — these will be import path issues, missing imports, or type mismatches from the migration. Do NOT change widget behavior to fix errors — only fix import paths, missing exports, and type references.
Re-run analysis until it passes with zero issues.
Do NOT modify pew_pew_plaza — task 10 handles that.
acceptance_criteria: Every .dart file created by tasks 1-8 has a corresponding export line in lib/turbo_widgets.dart
pubspec.yaml includes all required package dependencies with correct version constraints
`dart analyze --fatal-infos` passes with zero errors, warnings, or infos
constraints: Do NOT change widget behavior to fix analysis errors
Do NOT remove existing exports from the barrel
Use the same version constraint style as the existing pubspec (caret ^x.y.z)
goals: turbo_widgets compiles cleanly with all new widgets publicly exported
Any consumer can `import 'package:turbo_widgets/turbo_widgets.dart'` and access all moved widgets

No new package dependencies needed. Task 10 needs to update pew_pew_plaza call sites for the old t_empty_placeholder parameterized API: pass imageWidget instead of imageAsset, pass actionButtonBuilder wrapping TAddButton, pass padding wrapping TMargin's default padding.
handoff_from_task_5: Task 5 created 8 files: lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/beam_button.dart, lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/beam_line_painter.dart, lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/beam_button_border_reveal_painter.dart, lib/src/widgets/cards/t_entity_card.dart, lib/src/widgets/cards/t_create_card.dart, lib/src/widgets/misc/t_emoji_picker_popover.dart, lib/src/widgets/misc/t_category_view_with_search_on_left.dart, lib/src/widgets/misc/t_emoji_search_view.dart. worklog: Added 63 new export lines to lib/turbo_widgets.dart (from 52 to 115 exports). Added 3 new package dependencies to pubspec.yaml: mesh_gradient ^1.3.8, auto_size_text ^3.0.0, emoji_picker_flutter ^4.4.0. Fixed: (1) TSizes import missing in t_colors.dart, (2) ambiguous TSideNavBar export resolved by hiding showcase version in barrel (consumers import from specific path), (3) unused imports removed from t_glass_card.dart and t_empty_placeholder_icon_section.dart, (4) directives_ordering fixed in 20+ files. BLOCKER: workspace pub get fails due to pre-existing turbo_promptable test_api version conflict — emoji_picker_flutter cannot resolve, causing 60 cascade analysis errors in 3 emoji files. The pubspec.yaml change is correct and will work once the workspace conflict is fixed. All non-emoji analysis passes cleanly with zero issues.

on_complete.update_downstream_tasks: Record any analysis fixes made. Document the final list of exports added so task 10 knows exactly what's available.
